description_long: This object is a horizontally oriented banner composed of a series of three-dimensional Chinese characters rendered in a blue, glossy material. The characters are individually extruded, giving the banner a sculptural, raised appearance with visible depth and shadowing between each glyph. The surface of the characters appears smooth and reflective, suggesting a plastic or coated metal construction. There is no visible supporting structure, frame, or mounting hardware attached to the banner, making it appear as if the characters are floating or intended to be affixed directly to a surface. The overall length of the banner is much greater than its height, and the characters are evenly spaced in a single line. The design is clean and modern, suitable for prominent display in public or commercial urban environments.
description: A long, blue, three-dimensional banner featuring extruded Chinese characters with a glossy, smooth finish and no visible support structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full line of blue Chinese characters with clear depth and spacing.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness and extrusion of the characters.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view showing the back surfaces and the overall linear arrangement of the characters.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the depth and individual separation of each character.
